allow: PowerShell(foreach \($port in 5173,3001\) { try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "killed PID $_ on $port" } } catch { "nothing on $port" } })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.ProcessName} })
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('.github/workflows/keep-warm.yml','utf8'\);if\(!/cron:/.test\(s\)\)process.exit\(1\);console.log\('basic check OK \(no yaml lib\)'\)")
